item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response notices the repeated pattern as form fields patching process leaks and names the upstream issue as missing pre-action confirmation closure. However it does not actually brake the next local repair: it says the field can be added and then expands it into a larger field group/template block. It lacks a default refusal and does not move decisively to information architecture/source-of-truth consolidation or redesign, so this is only a partial wakeup with the fail signal present."}
